title: Project Wrap-Up & Code Inference
concept: Running the fine-tuned assistant on custom coding questions. 'Mini Project: code assistant is complete!'.

exercises.prompt: What is the purpose of using AST tools in code evaluation?
exercises.explain: AST tools help us analyze code structure to ensure there are no syntax issues.

cards.title: Running Your Fine-Tuned Assistant
cards.body: Now that you have fine-tuned your assistant, it's time to run it on your own coding questions!

cards.title: Code Inference
cards.body: Code inference refers to the ability of a code assistant to generate code solutions based on provided prompts.

cards.title: Like Asking a Friend for Help
cards.body: Imagine asking a smart friend to help you solve a coding problem. Code inference is similar; your assistant uses what it has learned to give you a useful answer.

cards.title: Example of Code Inference
cards.body: If you ask your assistant, 'How do I sort a list in Python?', it might generate: 'sorted(my_list)'.

cards.title: Myth: It's Perfect Every Time
cards.body: Some believe fine-tuned assistants always provide correct code. However, always review the suggestions for accuracy.

cards.title: Code Inference Process
cards.body: The process involves inputting questions and receiving code outputs.

exercises.prompt: What does running your fine-tuned assistant enable?

options.text: Generating code answers to specific questions

exercises.explain: Running your fine-tuned assistant allows it to provide specific code solutions to your questions.

exercises.prompt: True or False: Code inference can always be trusted without any review.
exercises.explain: It's important to review the generated code to ensure it's correct, even if it seems accurate.

exercises.prompt: Fill in the blank: Code inference involves generating code solutions based on __________ prompts.
exercises.sentence: Code inference involves generating code solutions based on custom prompts.
exercises.explain: Your assistant generates solutions specific to the instructions you provide.

exercises.prompt: Which of these is a key function of a fine-tuned coding assistant?

options.text: Offering code generation based on queries

exercises.explain: The main function of a fine-tuned coding assistant is to generate relevant code in response to user inquiries.

exercises.prompt: What is the primary benefit of using a fine-tuned code assistant for software projects?

options.text: It replaces all human coding completely
It provides quick solutions to coding questions
It guarantees bug-free code every time
It teaches programming concepts from scratch

exercises.explain: The primary benefit of using a fine-tuned code assistant is that it helps you quickly get answers to your coding questions, making your development process much easier. Mini Project: code assistant is complete!
